items.title: Anthropic Claude Code Source Code Leaked: What Happened, Why It Matters, and What Comes Next
items.summary: Reports indicate a significant leak of Anthropic Claude's source code, raising major security and competitive concerns within the AI industry.

items.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
items.summary: Microsoft has unveiled three new foundational AI models, intensifying its competition with other major players in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

items.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
items.summary: Anthropic introduces 'Cowork,' a new desktop agent for Claude designed to integrate directly with user files and automate tasks without requiring coding skills.

items.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
items.summary: OpenAI has acquired TBPN, a popular founder-led business talk show, signaling a potential expansion into media and content creation for the AI giant.

items.title: Nous Research's NousCoder-14B is an open-source coding model landing right in the Claude Code moment
items.summary: Nous Research releases NousCoder-14B, an open-source coding model, strategically timed with recent events surrounding Claude's code, offering an alternative for developers.

items.title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
items.summary: Railway has raised $100 million to develop AI-native cloud infrastructure, positioning itself as a significant challenger to established cloud providers like AWS.

items.title: Google now lets you direct avatars through prompts in its Vids app
items.summary: Google's Vids app now allows users to control avatars using natural language prompts, enhancing its AI-powered video creation capabilities.

items.title: ClawKeeper: Comprehensive Safety Protection for OpenClaw Agents Through Skills, Plugins, and Watchers
items.summary: A new paper introduces ClawKeeper, a robust framework designed to provide comprehensive safety and security for OpenClaw AI agents using a multi-layered approach.

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI has launched a new bug bounty program focused on safety, inviting researchers to identify and report vulnerabilities in its AI systems.

items.title: Terminal Agents Suffice for Enterprise Automation
items.summary: New research suggests that terminal-based AI agents are highly effective and sufficient for automating a wide range of tasks within enterprise environments.

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google introduces new options for the Gemini API, allowing developers to better balance inference cost and reliability based on their specific application needs.

items.title: How Emotion Shapes the Behavior of LLMs and Agents: A Mechanistic Study
items.summary: A mechanistic study explores how the simulation or understanding of emotions can influence the behavior and decision-making processes of large language models and AI agents.

items.title: Open, Reliable, and Collective: A Community-Driven Framework for Tool-Using AI Agents
items.summary: Researchers propose a community-driven framework aimed at developing open, reliable, and collaborative tool-using AI agents, fostering broader participation and trust.

items.title: Reasoning Shift: How Context Silently Shortens LLM Reasoning
items.summary: A new paper investigates how contextual information can subtly alter and shorten the reasoning paths taken by large language models, impacting their output.

items.title: Dynin-Omni: Omnimodal Unified Large Diffusion Language Model
items.summary: Introducing Dynin-Omni, a novel omnimodal unified large diffusion language model capable of processing and generating across various data modalities.
